title: Vortherion Sword
description: Tired of the normal Netherite Sword? Then try out my resource pack. This texture pack transforms the Netherite Sword into the Vortherion Sword.
body: # **Vortherion Sword Texture Pack** ## **Description** Tired of the normal Netherite Sword? Then try out my resource pack. This texture pack transforms the Netherite Sword into the Vortherion Sword. ## **Usage Guidelines** This texture pack is designed for non-commercial use, making it perfect for personal gameplay and non-monetized projects. When using the Vortherion Sword Texture Pack assets, please provide proper attribution by acknowledging the source.
